title: Theme Drawer Panel — Header-Triggered Right Panel
summary: Replace 981-line ThemeRuntimePanelButton dropdown with Drawer-based theme panel accessible from every page via header button. Includes live preview, theme doctor diagnostics, and UX redesign.

source_context.business_goal: Enable every user to customize theme appearance from any page without navigating to a separate admin page.
source_context.requested_outcome: Header button opens a right-side drawer with live accent, mode, density, radius controls and built-in theme diagnostics.

definition_of_done: Header button opens Drawer from every page
All existing theme admin functionality preserved
